Package io.graphite.builder

package io.graphite.builder
Fluent builders for graph construction.

This package provides builders for creating directed, undirected, random, and predefined graph structures using a fluent, chainable API.

Builders validate configuration before constructing graph instances, ensuring consistent graph creation.

Since:
2.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.graphite
    Graphite is a modern graph library for Java that provides graph data structures, graph algorithms, graph generation utilities, formatting, benchmarking, and graph input/output facilities.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractGraphBuilder<G extends Graph, SELF extends AbstractGraphBuilder<G,SELF>>
    Base implementation for all fluent graph builders.
    BenchmarkBuilder
     
    DirectedGraphBuilder
    Builds mutable or immutable directed graphs using a fluent API.
    GraphConfiguration
    Stores configuration options used during graph generation.
    Graphs
    Entry point for constructing, generating, and obtaining graph instances.
    UndirectedGraphBuilder
    Builds mutable or immutable undirected graphs using a fluent API.
